items.toString: This work item relates to PDT-2942

items.fromString:
*Reproduce Steps:*

We have 2 problems : 

# We have a proforma invoice which is created on 24.04.2026 (04/2026 accounting period) and issued the same day. On 19.05.2026 we have a payment with date 18.05.2026. 
# Missing contract/order type - examples : ЕКИ-1100138881, ЕКИ-1100138887 и ЕКИ-1100138890

*Actual Result:*

# The system incorrectly updates the invoice date, accounting period, and payment due date to the payment registration date. As a result, invoice ЕФУ-1100138843 was included in the VAT dairy  for 04/2026 period and included again in the VAT dairy for 05/2026 period.
!{54D22846-A81A-46A7-910C-9BE59213D62E}-20260608-074200.png|width=647,alt="{54D22846-A81A-46A7-910C-9BE59213D62E}-20260608-074200.png"!
# Missing values in contract/order type column:
!image-20260608-073505.png|width=647,alt="image-20260608-073505.png"!

*Expected Result:*

The system should change the invoice date, accounting period, and payment due date only when the pro forma invoice is converted into a real invoice.



_________________

Endpoint:

Status:
Payload:
Response:
items.toString:
*Reproduce Steps:*

We have 2 problems : 

# We have a proforma invoice which is created on 24.04.2026 (04/2026 accounting period) and issued the same day. On 19.05.2026 we have a payment with date 18.05.2026. 
# Missing contract/order type - examples : ЕКИ-1100138881, ЕКИ-1100138887 и ЕКИ-1100138890

*Actual Result:*

# The system incorrectly updates the invoice date, accounting period, and payment due date to the payment registration date. As a result, invoice ЕФУ-1100138843 was included in the VAT dairy  for 04/2026 period and included again in the VAT dairy for 05/2026 period.
!{54D22846-A81A-46A7-910C-9BE59213D62E}-20260608-074200.png|width=647,alt="{54D22846-A81A-46A7-910C-9BE59213D62E}-20260608-074200.png"!
# Missing values in contract/order type column:
!image-20260608-073505.png|width=647,alt="image-20260608-073505.png"!

*Expected Result:*

The system should change the invoice date, accounting period,  payment due date and current_status_change_date only when the pro forma invoice is converted into a real invoice.



_________________

fields.summary: VAT Diary report - Incorrectly included issued pro forma invoice and missing contract/order type

content.text: We have a proforma invoice which is created on 24.04.2026 (04/2026 accounting period) and issued the same day. On 19.05.2026 we have a payment with date 18.05.2026.
Missing contract/order type - examples : ЕКИ-1100138881, ЕКИ-1100138887 и ЕКИ-1100138890

The system incorrectly updates the invoice date, accounting period, and payment due date to the payment registration date. As a result, invoice ЕФУ-1100138843 was included in the VAT dairy  for 04/2026 period and included again in the VAT dairy for 05/2026 period.
Missing values in contract/order type column:
The system should change the invoice date, accounting period,  payment due date and current_status_change_date only when the pro forma invoice is converted into a real invoice.
